hooks.command: APPENDONLY_PATHS='improvement-log\.md|decisions/' APPENDONLY_MSG='improvement-log.md and decisions/ are append-only. Mark stale, do not delete.' ~/Projects/skills/hooks/pretool-append-only-guard.sh

fp=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null) || exit 0
case "$fp" in
  */meta/research/*.md|*/meta/scripts/*.py)
    cd /Users/alien/Projects/meta && uv run python3 scripts/generate-indexes.py --fix > /dev/null 2>&1 &
    ;;
esac
exit 0
